opportunities.description:
SEEKING WORK | Richmond, VA | Remote
Contact: jesse@objectfactory.io Hi! I had pretty good luck in this thread last time I participated. I was able
to connect with a few great people and work on interesting projects for them.
The world has changed quite a bit since then, so we'll see how this goes. Last October, after ~4 years, I left an Engineering Lead role at a small
podcasting software company. Previously I've founded/sold a solo startup in the
web accessibility space, worked in digital agencies for ~7 years, and built
software for TV/Radio operations. Since October, I&

opportunities.description: Perplexity AI is looking for experienced Generalist Software Engineers to join our Perplexity and Comet application teams. opportunities.title: AI Fintech Engineering Intern - Backend & Data Systems
opportunities.description:
ImmoSteuer365 is building an AI-driven fintech product for real estate investment decision support in Germany. The product helps private investors understand the long-term tax, financing, renovation and cash-flow impact of their real estate decisions before they commit capital.

opportunities.title: [Hiring] Looking for Participants (USA & Canada) – Paid AI Data Collection Project
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Looking for Participants (USA & Canada) – Paid AI Data Collection Project

I'm helping recruit participants in the USA and Canada for a paid AI data collection project. The project involves recording first-person (POV) videos of your hands while performing everyday household activities. These recordings will be used to help train and improve AI models. Examples of activities include: Washing dishes Cooking and meal preparation Cleaning Laundry Organizing Other everyday household tasks Project Details 💰 $12 per approved hour ✅ No interview or assessment required 🚀 Start immediately ♾️

opportunities.title: Senior Communications Consultant – German Media & Strategic Communications
opportunities.description:
ISD is an independent, non-partisan, non-profit organisation dedicated to safeguarding elections, freedom, national security, public safety and individual rights by reversing the rising global tide of polarisation, extremism, foreign interference and authoritarianism. Combining research and analysis with government advisory work and the design and delivery of training, education and communications programs, ISD works to implement real-world, evidence-based responses to these challenges.
